unicode.value: La casa que se quedó a oscuras… o no
Ángela Bracho Núñez

En esta situación de aprendizaje, el alumnado se enfrentará a un reto cercano y reconocible: comprender por qué unas bombillas iluminan más que otras dependiendo de cómo estén conectadas. Aunque a primera vista pueda parecer un contenido técnico, se aborda desde una perspectiva práctica y reflexiva, permitiendo que el alumnado construya el conocimiento a partir de la experimentación y la discusión.
master class
closed exercise or problem
real project
didactic game
open problem
conceptual map
Sección
La casa que se quedó a oscuras… o no
Explorando circuitos en serie y en paralelo

Vamos a ponerte a prueba.

Imagínate que te encargan diseñar la luz de una casa… pero con una condición:
👉 tiene que iluminar bien
👉 y no puede fallar todo si una bombilla se estropea

Parece fácil, ¿no? Pues ya veremos...

Ten cuidado: lo que parece lógico al principio (eso de “repartir la electricidad”) no siempre funciona como crees.
Text and Tasks
🧱 BLOQUE 1: ¿Dónde habrá más luz?
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
University of Auckland

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter a hint here. If you do not want to provide a hint, leave this field blank.
Select the correct option by clicking on the radio button.

Although more often used in formal testing situations MCQs can be used as a testing tool to stimulate thought and discussion on topics students may feel a little reticent in responding to. When designing a MCQ test consider the following:
  • What learning outcomes are the questions testing
  • What intellectual skills are being tested
  • What are the language skills of the audience
  • Gender and cultural issues
  • Avoid grammar language and question structures that might provide clues
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.

When building an MCQ consider the following:
  • Use phrases that learners are familiar with and have encountered in their study
  • Keep responses concise
  • There should be some consistency between the stem and the responses
  • Provide enough options to challenge learners to think about their response
  • Try to make sure that correct responses are not more detailed than the distractors
  • Distractors should be incorrect but plausible
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.
Enter a hint here. If you do not want to provide a hint, leave this field blank.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
A. HABITACIÓN CIRCUITO SERIE

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.

Fíjate bien en cómo se mueve la electricidad.

En este caso, la corriente solo tiene un único camino y tiene que pasar por todas las bombillas una detrás de otra.

🔎 Eso hace que la energía que sale de la pila se vaya repartiendo entre todas, por lo que cada bombilla recibe menos.

💡 Por eso brillan menos.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
B. HABITACIÓN CIRCUITO PARALELO

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.

Correcto 👍

En este caso, la corriente eléctrica tiene varios caminos para circular.

🔌 Cada bombilla está conectada de forma independiente, como si cada una tuviera su propio acceso a la pila.

⚡ Eso hace que cada bombilla reciba la misma energía y pueda iluminar más.

💡 Por eso hay más luz en este tipo de circuito.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
C. LAS DOS HABITACIONES SE ILUMINAN IGUAL

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.

Puede parecer que deberían iluminar igual, pero todo depende de cómo circula la electricidad.

🔌 Si solo hay un camino, la energía se reparte entre las bombillas.

⚡ Pero si hay varios caminos, la corriente puede llegar de forma diferente.

👉 Piensa: ¿todas reciben la misma cantidad de energía o no?
Text and Tasks
🧪 BLOQUE 2: Simulación PhET
Text and Tasks
🧠 BLOQUE 3: Reflexión
Text and Tasks

Although more often used in formal testing situations MCQs can be used as a testing tool to stimulate thought and discussion on topics students may feel a little reticent in responding to. When designing a MCQ test consider the following:
  • What learning outcomes are the questions testing
  • What intellectual skills are being tested
  • What are the language skills of the audience
  • Gender and cultural issues
  • Avoid grammar language and question structures that might provide clues
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.

When building an MCQ consider the following:
  • Use phrases that learners are familiar with and have encountered in their study
  • Keep responses concise
  • There should be some consistency between the stem and the responses
  • Provide enough options to challenge learners to think about their response
  • Try to make sure that correct responses are not more detailed than the distractors
  • Distractors should be incorrect but plausible
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.

❓ Pregunta 1: ¿Qué cambia?
Después de ver el vídeo, ¿qué diferencia principal hay entre un circuito en serie y uno en paralelo?
Enter a hint here. If you do not want to provide a hint, leave this field blank.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 En serie hay un solo camino y en paralelo hay varios caminos

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.

Exacto 👍
La clave está en los caminos: uno solo en serie y varios en paralelo.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 En paralelo la electricidad se mueve más rápido

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Fíjate en algo importante: no es cuestión de rapidez ni de cantidad total de energía, sino de cómo puede circular la electricidad.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 En serie hay más energía

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Fíjate en algo importante: no es cuestión de rapidez ni de cantidad total de energía, sino de cómo puede circular la electricidad.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 No hay diferencias importantes

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Fíjate en algo importante: no es cuestión de rapidez ni de cantidad total de energía, sino de cómo puede circular la electricidad.
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.

⚡ Pregunta 2: ¿Por qué brillan diferente?

¿Por qué las bombillas brillan menos en un circuito en serie?
Enter a hint here. If you do not want to provide a hint, leave this field blank.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 Porque la pila tiene menos energía

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.

Muy bien 👍
Al haber un solo camino, la energía se reparte entre todas las bombillas, y cada una recibe menos.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 Porque la energía se reparte entre todas las bombillas

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 Porque la electricidad se detiene

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 Porque las bombillas están rotas

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.

🔌 Pregunta 3: Paralelo (la importante)

¿Qué ocurre en un circuito en paralelo?
Enter a hint here. If you do not want to provide a hint, leave this field blank.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 La energía se divide en partes iguales y llega menos

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 Solo funciona una bombilla

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 La electricidad se pierde

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 Cada bombilla tiene su propio camino y recibe la misma energía

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
🔘 Cada bombilla tiene su propio camino y recibe la misma energía
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.

🎯 Pregunta 4

Si quitas una bombilla…
Enter a hint here. If you do not want to provide a hint, leave this field blank.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 En paralelo se apagan todas

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 No pasa nada en ningún caso

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 En serie se apagan todas y en paralelo siguen funcionando las demás

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Correcto 👍
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.
🔘 Solo se apaga una en serie

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
🔢 BLOQUE 4: Matemáticas
💥CIRCUITO [caso de 2 RESISTENCIAS] en PARALELO ➤ Las FÓRMULAS que NO TE ENSEÑARON 🙄
Text and Tasks
Text and Tasks
🎯 Objetivo (para ti, no hace falta decirlo así en clase) Que comprendan de verdad la diferencia entre serie y paralelo, sobre todo: 👉 en paralelo no se reparte la energía

🧠 Conocimientos previos Para abordar esta situación de aprendizaje, el alumnado debería partir de algunas ideas básicas, aunque no necesariamente consolidadas del todo (y eso, en realidad, nos viene bien 😉): 🔋 Identificación de elementos de un circuito sencillo: pila, cables y bombilla. 🔌 Comprensión básica de que la electricidad necesita un camino cerrado para funcionar. 💡 Experiencias cotidianas con la luz (por ejemplo, saber que en casa si una bombilla se funde, las demás siguen funcionando). ➗ Nociones elementales de reparto o división, aunque aún tiendan a aplicarlas de forma automática a cualquier situación.
Ángela Bracho Núñez

En esta situación de aprendizaje, el alumnado se enfrentará a un reto cercano y reconocible: comprender por qué unas bombillas iluminan más que otras dependiendo de cómo estén conectadas. Aunque a primera vista pueda parecer un contenido técnico, se aborda desde una perspectiva práctica y reflexiva, permitiendo que el alumnado construya el conocimiento a partir de la experimentación y la discusión.
Digital Interactivo

Este recurso se distribuye bajo licencia Creative Commons Reconocimiento–NoComercial–CompartirIgual (CC BY-NC-SA). Se permite su uso, adaptación y distribución siempre que se reconozca la autoría, no se utilice con fines comerciales y se mantenga la misma licencia.
Circuitos eléctricos
La casa que se quedó a oscuras… o no
Actividad de aprendizaje; recurso interactivo; simulación
creative commons: attribution - share alike 4.0

string.value:
CONOCIMIENTO PREVIO: \xf0\x9f\xa7\xa0 Conocimientos previos
Para abordar esta situaci\xc3\xb3n de aprendizaje, el alumnado deber\xc3\xada partir de algunas ideas b\xc3\xa1sicas, aunque no necesariamente consolidadas del todo (y eso, en realidad, nos viene bien \xf0\x9f\x98\x89):
\xf0\x9f\x94\x8b Identificaci\xc3\xb3n de elementos de un circuito sencillo: pila, cables y bombilla.
\xf0\x9f\x94\x8c Comprensi\xc3\xb3n b\xc3\xa1sica de que la electricidad necesita un camino cerrado para funcionar.
\xf0\x9f\x92\xa1 Experiencias cotidianas con la luz (por ejemplo, saber que en casa si una bombilla se funde, las dem\xc3\xa1s siguen funcionando).
\xe2\x9e\x97 Nociones elementales de reparto o divisi\xc3\xb3n, aunque a\xc3\xban tiendan a aplicarlas de forma autom\xc3\xa1tica a cualquier situaci\xc3\xb3n.

OBJETIVOS: \xf0\x9f\x8e\xaf Objetivo (para ti, no hace falta decirlo as\xc3\xad en clase)\nQue comprendan de verdad la diferencia entre serie y paralelo, sobre todo:\n\xf0\x9f\x91\x89 en paralelo no se reparte la energ\xc3\xada

En esta situaci\xc3\xb3n de aprendizaje, el alumnado se enfrentar\xc3\xa1 a un reto cercano y reconocible: comprender por qu\xc3\xa9 unas bombillas iluminan m\xc3\xa1s que otras dependiendo de c\xc3\xb3mo est\xc3\xa9n conectadas.\nAunque a primera vista pueda parecer un contenido t\xc3\xa9cnico, se aborda desde una perspectiva pr\xc3\xa1ctica y reflexiva, permitiendo que el alumnado construya el conocimiento a partir de la experimentaci\xc3\xb3n y la discusi\xc3\xb3n.

unicode.value: CONOCIMIENTO PREVIO: 🧠 Conocimientos previos Para abordar esta situación de aprendizaje, el alumnado debería partir de algunas ideas básicas, aunque no necesariamente consolidadas del todo (y eso, en realidad, nos viene bien 😉): 🔋 Identificación de elementos de un circuito sencillo: pila, cables y bombilla. 🔌 Comprensión básica de que la electricidad necesita un camino cerrado para funcionar. 💡 Experiencias cotidianas con la luz (por ejemplo, saber que en casa si una bombilla se funde, las demás siguen funcionando). ➗ Nociones elementales de reparto o división, aunque aún tiendan a aplicarlas de forma automática a cualquier situación.
OBJETIVOS: 🎯 Objetivo (para ti, no hace falta decirlo así en clase) Que comprendan de verdad la diferencia entre serie y paralelo, sobre todo: 👉 en paralelo no se reparte la energía

string.value: En esta situaci\xc3\xb3n de aprendizaje, el alumnado se enfrentar\xc3\xa1 a un reto cercano y reconocible: comprender por qu\xc3\xa9 unas bombillas iluminan m\xc3\xa1s que otras dependiendo de c\xc3\xb3mo est\xc3\xa9n conectadas.\nAunque a primera vista pueda parecer un contenido t\xc3\xa9cnico, se aborda desde una perspectiva pr\xc3\xa1ctica y reflexiva, permitiendo que el alumnado construya el conocimiento a partir de la experimentaci\xc3\xb3n y la discusi\xc3\xb3n.
